synthesis_logic.collection: Orchestrator reads all {run_dir}/results/*.json, filters by run_id match, accumulates into all_results list, builds file_owners map for conflict detection.
synthesis_logic.aggregation: Results sorted deterministically by task_id. Per-task output: icon + tid + status + summary[:500]. Final line: Total/Succeeded/Failed/Conflicts counts.
synthesis_logic.conflict_detection: file_owners dict tracks which tasks modified same files; conflicts = files with >1 task owner.
synthesis_logic.post_synthesis: Optional auto-merger invoked after synthesis; applies Shadow Score weighted scoring across 3 layers.

atomic_writes.pattern: Write to .tmp-{task_id}.json then os.rename(tmp, final) for POSIX atomic semantics.
atomic_writes.failure_mode: If crash mid-write, .tmp- file remains but final never appears. Monitor/counters exclude .tmp-* files.
atomic_writes.error_results: Even error results use same atomic pattern - always safe to read final files.

file_naming.scheme: Task-ID based: {run_dir}/results/{task_id}.json (agent_id stored inside JSON, not in filename).
file_naming.discovery: Orchestrator: sorted(os.listdir(results_dir)) filtered by .endswith(.json). Monitor: find with -not -name .tmp-*.
file_naming.structure: Flat directory - no per-agent subdirectories under results/.

enforcement_points: Task manifest JSON: max_result_words: 500 in constraints
Worker code: split+slice at 500 words, appends [truncated]
Orchestrator display: summary[:500] character slice as defense-in-depth
word_count_enforcement.scope: Applies only to summary field; files_changed, branch, metadata fields are unbounded.
word_count_enforcement.rationale: Prevents orchestrator context window exhaustion when synthesizing N worker results.

scoring.mechanism: Shadow Score via merger agent post-synthesis (not during synthesis itself).
scoring.dimensions: Completeness(30%) + Scope(25%) + Quality(20%) + Test(15%) + Conflict(10%) normalized to /50.
scoring.bonuses: Speed bonus (+2), Stuck penalty (-1 per event, max -3).
scoring.quality_gates: No score threshold rejects results. Only irreconcilable merge conflicts cause branch skip.
scoring.conflict_resolution: Higher-scoring branch preferred during merge conflicts.

key_insights: Synthesis is deterministic (sorted by task_id) enabling reproducible output.
Two-layer defense on word count: worker truncation + orchestrator character slice.
Scoring is post-hoc (merger), not pre-filter - all completed results enter synthesis.
Atomic writes via POSIX rename guarantee readers never see partial results.
No per-agent subdirs - flat results/ dir simplifies discovery but relies on task_id uniqueness.
